props.name: divider
props.comment: Optional divider element rendered between each field in a tab.

props.name: record
props.comment: Explicit record to display (falls back to RecordContext).

props.name: spacing
props.comment: Gap between fields within each tab's content panel (in px).

props.name: syncWithLocation
props.comment: When true (default), tab changes update the URL.

props.name: tabs
props.comment: Custom tab-strip renderer. If provided, replaces the default TabsList.

props.name: value
props.comment: Controlled tab value override. When provided, forces the Tabs into controlled mode.
